The DateCalc Gazette
Est. 1955  ·  Vol. 26  ·  2026 Edition
Age by Birth Year

Born in
1955

Your age in 2026
70 or 71 years old

If you were born in 1955, you turn 71 in 2026. Before your birthday you are still 70.

→ Calculate your exact age
The World in 1955
🌍EventsWest Germany joins NATO on May 5 · Albert Einstein dies in Princeton on April 18 · Disneyland opens in Anaheim, California on July 17 · Warsaw Pact signed as Soviet military alliance in May · Rosa Parks refuses to give up her bus seat (Dec 1) · Montgomery Bus Boycott begins after Parks' arrest
🎵MusicRock Around the Clock – Bill Haley & His Comets
🎬FilmRebel Without a Cause
💻TechPolio vaccine developed by Jonas Salk approved for widespread use
🛒PricesBread $0.18 · Gas $0.29/gal · House $11,700

How old am I if I was born in 1955?

If you were born in 1955, you are 70 years old for most of 2026, turning 71 once your birthday arrives. Your exact age depends on whether your birthday has already passed this year. Someone born on January 1, 1955 turns 71 on January 1, 2026, while someone born on December 31, 1955 only turns 71 on December 31, 2026. Use the age calculator above for your precise age down to the day. People born in 1955 have lived through 71 years of history and belong to the Baby Boomer generation.

What generation was born in 1955?

People born in 1955 belong to the Baby Boomer generation. This generation grew up during a unique period in history and witnessed major changes in technology, culture, and society. Use the calculator above to find your exact chronological age in years, months, weeks, and days.

Growing up in the 1950s

Born in the 1950s, you came into a world of post-war prosperity and cautious optimism in the Western world. The decade saw the rise of rock and roll, early space exploration, and television entering family homes across continents. Cold War tensions shaped politics, while consumer culture and suburban life became the new norm.

Frequently asked questions

How old am I if I was born in 1955?

If you were born in 1955, you are 70 or 71 years old in 2026. You turn 71 on your birthday in 2026. Use the age calculator for your exact age to the day.

How many years from 1955 to 2026?

From 1955 to 2026 is 71 years. If your birthday has not yet passed in 2026, you are still 70 years old.

What day of the week was I born in 1955?

The day of the week depends on your specific birth date. Use the age calculator and enter your full date of birth to find out exactly which day of the week you were born.

How many days old am I if I was born in 1955?

Someone born on January 1, 1955 has lived approximately 25932 days as of January 1, 2026. Your exact number of days depends on your birth date. Enter your date of birth in the age calculator for the precise count.

What generation am I if I was born in 1955?

People born in 1955 belong to the Baby Boomer generation. Each generation is shaped by the historical events and cultural trends of their formative years.

Source U.S. Social Security Administration – Life Expectancy Calculator
